themes.reasoning_notes: Aura that buffs a creature and grants repeatable can't-block evasion; classic Aura-based combat support.
Activated ability makes a blocker unable to block enchanted creature, helping attacks connect.
+2/+2 and attack-pushing text fit aggressive creature decks, though it's not a dedicated aggro payoff.
Type line is Aura and its whole function is enhancing one creature with +2/+2 plus an activated combat ability; this is straightforward Aura support.
It grants repeatable 'target creature can't block this creature this turn,' which helps the enchanted creature push through blockers.
